---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement to the Servicialo standard or tooling
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Scope

<!-- Check the area(s) this feature applies to -->

- [ ] Protocol specification (new dimension, state, or exception flow)
- [ ] New evidence vertical
- [ ] MCP server (`@servicialo/mcp-server`)
- [ ] JSON Schemas
- [ ] Website / documentation
- [ ] Tooling / developer experience

## Problem or motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?
     Link to any related issues or discussions. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.
     For protocol changes, consider following the RFC format in CONTRIBUTING.md:
     - Motivation
     - Proposal
     - Impact on existing implementations
     - Alternatives considered -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one preferred? -->

## Who benefits?

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Service providers (professionals)
- [ ] Service consumers (clients)
- [ ] Platform implementers (e.g., Coordinalo)
- [ ] AI agent developers
- [ ] Standard contributors

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, examples, links to similar features in other standards, etc. -->

---

> **Note:** Changes to the core protocol (8 dimensions, 9 states, 6 exception flows, 7 principles) require a formal RFC with a 14-day discussion period. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.
